calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appearing by Zoom for Haihong Cui.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the materials, that the application is satisfactory, and that the Spousal Property Petition could be granted. The Court took Haihong Cui's Spousal Property Petition under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Continued To Aug-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
